title: arundina pentandra
intro: Arundina pentandra, also known as the grass orchid, is a type of orchid native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Arundina pentandra include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of diabetes. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also applied topically to wounds and skin conditions.
